downstream_impact: L3 guide-vs-control RNA response cannot be evaluated. Stage 3+ analysis requiring L3 RNA response is blocked.
reason: No guide-vs-control RNA response evidence found. Available per_guide data contains only count summaries (n_cells, total_umi, n_genes) without RNA response features such as delta, logFC, top differential genes, or expression-change evidence.
required_for_unblock: Expression matrix with per-gene counts for guide and control cells
Differential expression results (logFC, adjusted p-value, top genes)
Or pre-computed per-guide RNA response with delta/logFC/top_genes
resolution: measured L3 guide-vs-control RNA response computed from raw cDNA counts
